summary: Iteration 122 - Sidebar Dimming (C4) + User Accent Colour (C5): Both frontend features verified and working. Sidebar dimming uses Tailwind group-hover pattern with 3 nav groups (Workspace, Schedule, Account). Accent colour feature has 8 swatches, CSS variable updates, localStorage persistence, and Reset button functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 122 features verified: (1) Sidebar Dimming - 3 group divs wrapping nav sections, inactive items have group-hover:opacity-60 and hover:!opacity-100, active items have opacity-100 without dimming classes. (2) Accent Colour - 8 swatches with data-testid format accent-swatch-{name}, accent-colour-section, accent-reset-btn. localStorage key 'kolor_app_accent' stores selected colour. main.tsx applies stored accent on boot before React mounts.

workspace_group.details: Group 1 contains 5 items: sidebar-kanban, sidebar-list, sidebar-quotes, sidebar-contracts, sidebar-analytics

inactive_items_dimming_classes.details: All inactive items (sidebar-list, sidebar-quotes, sidebar-contracts, sidebar-analytics, sidebar-calendar, sidebar-portfolio, sidebar-sequences) have group-hover:opacity-60 and hover:!opacity-100

active_item_no_dimming.details: Active item (sidebar-kanban) has opacity-100 and does NOT have group-hover:opacity-60

transition_classes.details: All nav buttons have transition-opacity duration-150

non_dimming_elements.details: sidebar-user-block and sidebar-settings do NOT have group-hover:opacity-60

swatches_count.details: All 8 swatches found: kolor-purple, midnight, ocean, forest, ember, rose, slate, crimson

css_variable_update.details: Clicking Ocean swatch changed --brand-primary from #6C2EDB to #0369A1

localStorage_set.details: localStorage('kolor_app_accent') set to #0369A1 after clicking Ocean

reset_button_visibility.details: Reset button visible when non-default colour selected, hidden when default selected

reset_functionality.details: Clicking Reset restored --brand-primary to #6C2EDB and removed localStorage key

descriptive_text.details: Section has 'Your workspace colour — only visible to you' and 'Your brand colours for clients are set in the Brand tab'

persistence_after_refresh.details: Forest colour (#15803D) persisted after page refresh - main.tsx applies stored accent before React mounts
